{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Quill and Candle
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Quill and Candle]] is the symbol of the [[Guild of Witnesses]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
